ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment was performed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., tissue, cell culture) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sample */,
  "sample_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sample (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectra_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., mzML, mzXML) */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument used to generate the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_files_instrument_model FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_model") REFERENCES instrumentation ("instrument_model"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrum file the peptide was identified from */,
  "base_sequence" TEXT /* Base sequence of the peptide */,
  "full_sequence" TEXT /* Full sequence of the peptide */,
  "peptide_monoisotopic_mass" REAL /* Monoisotopic mass of the peptide */,
  "precursor_charge" INTEGER /* Charge of the precursor ion */,
  "scan_retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the scan */,
  "peptide_score" REAL /* Score of the peptide identification */,
  "peptide_probability" REAL /* Probability of the peptide identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES spectra_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism the protein is from */,
  "protein_function" TEXT /* Function of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_protein_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide-protein link */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_protein_links_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptide_protein_links_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the principal investigator is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the experiment was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "lab_description" TEXT /* Description of the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_location" TEXT /* Location of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)
